hero.description: I capture unique moments and transform them into images that tell a story. My goal is to reveal the emotion, beauty and authenticity of each moment by creating timeless and elegant visual memories. Through my lens, I offer an artistic experience that enhances details and brings projects to life, whether portraits, events or bespoke visual creations.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who am I ?
about.intro: Passionate about photography, I bring my artistic eye and sensitivity to every project. My aim is to transform unique moments into timeless images capable of conveying emotion and telling a story.
about.point1: Capture authentic portraits that reveal personality.
about.point2: Immortalize events to preserve vivid memories.
about.point3: Create elegant and artistic visual compositions.
about.point4: Highlight details and light to enhance every image.
about.goal: My ambition is to offer a unique photographic experience where each shot becomes a precious memory and a work of art.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.intro: Through my lens, I seek to capture the authenticity of moments and transform each image into a work that tells a story. My expertise combines creativity, technique and artistic sensitivity to deliver unique and memorable visuals.

editing.title: Retouching & Post‑production
editing.item3: Give a unique atmosphere to each image

technique.title: Technique & Equipment
technique.item1: Mastery of natural and artificial light

projects.title: My Works
projects.intro: My journey in photography and video has allowed me to cover a wide range of events, including weddings, birthdays, baptisms and artistic reports. My constant goal is to immortalize your precious moments through images and films that tell a story, offering you unique and timeless memories.

mariage1.title: Wedding – Preparations & Ceremony
mariage1.description: Capturing the intimate moments of preparation and the ceremony, with full photography of preparations and the couple's moments of complicity.
mariage1.results: Photo album delivered in digital and print format.
mariage1.impact: Timeless memories for the newlyweds and their families.

mariage2.title: Wedding – Reception & Party
mariage2.description: Coverage of the reception and party, with photos of speeches, activities and festive moments of the evening.
mariage2.results: Dynamic gallery of the key moments.

mariage3.title: Wedding – Couple Portraits
mariage3.description: Artistic photo session of the couple, with posed and natural portraits in chosen settings.
mariage3.results: Artistic photos delivered in high resolution.

mariage4.title: Wedding – Family & Guests
mariage4.description: Group photos and shots of guests, capturing smiles and shared moments.

mariage5.title: Wedding – Details & Decorations
mariage5.description: Photography of details and decorations, highlighting rings, bouquets, tables and decor.

mariage6.title: Wedding – Full Reportage
mariage6.description: Complete wedding coverage, with photos from start to finish: preparations, ceremony, reception and party.
mariage6.results: Complete album delivered in a premium box.

anniversaire1.title: Birthday – Decoration & Atmosphere
anniversaire1.description: Photos of colorful decorations, balloons and the festive atmosphere.
anniversaire1.results: A lively gallery that reflects the joy of the celebration.
anniversaire1.impact: Warm memories for the host and their family.

anniversaire2.title: Birthday – Guest Portraits
anniversaire2.description: Spontaneous portraits of guests, capturing smiles, dances and friendly exchanges.
anniversaire2.impact: Shared memories among friends and family.

anniversaire3.title: Birthday – Key Moments
anniversaire3.description: Photos of key moments: cake, candles and activities, capturing the energy and joy of guests.
anniversaire3.impact: Memorable keepsakes for the host and their loved ones.

portrait1.title: Portrait – Studio
portrait1.description: Studio photo session with posed portraits taken under professional lighting.

portrait2.title: Portrait – Outdoor
portrait2.description: Outdoor photo session with natural portraits in urban or rural settings.

portrait3.title: Portrait – Artistic
portrait3.description: Creative and original portraits, experimenting with light, colors and poses.

artistique1.title: Art Project – Black & White
artistique1.description: Black and white photo series exploring contrasts and emotions.

artistique2.title: Art Project – Light & Shadow
artistique2.description: Experimentation with light, playing with shadows and highlights for unique portraits.

artistique3.title: Art Project – Colors & Textures
artistique3.description: Colorful and textured photo series exploring vivid colors and textures to create original and expressive compositions.

evenement1.title: Event – Professional Fair
evenement1.description: Photo coverage of a professional fair, capturing exchanges and key moments.
evenement1.results: Album delivered for internal and external communication.

evenement2.title: Event – Local Conference
evenement2.description: Photo report of a conference, highlighting speakers and the audience.

evenement3.title: Event – Beauty Fashion Show
evenement3.description: Video and photos of a beauty fashion show, capturing elegance and creativity of participants.
evenement3.results: Video edit and photo album delivered.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.intro: Would you like to immortalize a wedding, a birthday, a portrait or an artistic project? I am available to discuss your ideas and support you in creating visual memories. Contact me via the form or directly by phone or email.
